name: Bird of Paradise Lost
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>獄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>落</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鳥</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: This card gains 100 ATK and DEF for each Tuner monster in your Graveyard. Once per turn: You can send 1 Tuner monster from your hand to the Graveyard, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the End Phase.
mnst_eff: This card gains 100 ATK and DEF for each Tuner monster in your Graveyard. Once per turn: You can send 1 Tuner monster from your hand to the Graveyard, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the End Phase.
eff: This card gains 100 ATK and DEF for each Tuner monster in your Graveyard. Once per turn: You can send 1 Tuner monster from your hand to the Graveyard, then target 1 monster your opponent controls; take control of it until the End Phase.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Takes control of an opponent's monster
